## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall line coverage 61.9% below the 80% default bar**
  - **Status quo:** 4 117 / 6 648 instrumentable production lines. SymMeetWhisperKit 0%, SymMeetMCP 31.9% (ToolHandlers 17.9%), SymMeetCapture 40.5% (CaptureSession 0%), symmeet CLI 44.4%. SymMeetCore strong at 82.5%; privacy authorization healthy (RecordingAuthorization 95.5%, ConsentRecord 100%, RetentionPolicy 100%).
  - **Likely cause:** Hardware/ML-dependent layers (capture session, WhisperKit engine) and subprocess-driven CLI paths have no test harness; MCP tool dispatch largely untested.
  - **Proposed solution:** Plan targeted tests for WhisperKit engine, MCP ToolHandlers and CaptureSession via the existing fixtures; not required for this first beta (warn-only, no repo gate).
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-07-22T18-59-17Z.md` → `/03-gh-go`
